steps.title: Spot the clarifying function
steps.content: The sentence at the blank explains what the 900 trick means — it defines the trick itself rather than contrasting it or placing it in time.

steps.title: Match the transition to the function
steps.content: In other words signals a clarification or restatement of a preceding idea, which bridges from introducing the trick to defining what it entails. Nevertheless and On the other hand signal contrast, and Previously signals past sequencing — neither of which fits a clarifying transition. That matches choice D — D is correct.
